Formerly: PLCY699D.

PLCY688 Topics in Public Policy (1-3 Credits)

Special topics in Public Policy.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY688 or PUAF688.

Formerly: PUAF688.
